summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 6 dark mode, sound toggle, and mobile touch features. Fixed critical ThemeToggle import bug. All core features working excellently.

ui_bugs.issue: 0% of buttons meet 44px minimum touch target requirement on mobile
Logout button element outside viewport causing click failures

passed_tests: Theme toggle functionality on landing page
Dark mode styling and CSS overrides
Dark mode on all dashboard tabs (Recommendations, Leads, Credit, AI)
AI chat functionality in dark mode
Complete user authentication flow in dark mode
Green accent color visibility in dark mode
Language toggle working alongside theme toggle
All existing features working in dark mode
